caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a red and black logo, and black over-ear headphones sits in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The microphone is branded with the word "Blue" on the boom arm's adjustment knob. The man is speaking into the microphone, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks. He has a tattoo on his right forearm. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, and the camera angle is static, focusing on his upper body. There is no on-screen text, and the scene remains consistent across the frames, with only the man's subtle movements and changes in expression providing a sense of progression.
